title: Add MCP elicitation handler (server prompts user mid-tool-call)
description: CC declares `elicitation:{}` in initialize capabilities (client.ts:999) and registers an ElicitRequestSchema handler (elicitationHandler.ts:68-313, client.ts:1191-1197). OC does not declare elicitation in the initialize params (src/mcp.rs:382-389) and has no elicitation handler. Servers that send elicitation requests receive no response from OC — effectively a silent hang or cancel. Required: declare capability, register handler, pipe request to UI or hook system.
